metadata.description: 19 modular skills for idiomatic Go, derived from Effective Go, Google Go Style Guide, Uber Go Style Guide, and Go Wiki CodeReviewComments. Backed by 46 reference files, 8 automation scripts, and 4 asset templates.

plugins.name: golang-skills
plugins.description: 19 Go skills (each under 210 lines) with progressive disclosure, conditional cross-references, and bundled automation. Covers style, naming, error handling, testing, concurrency, generics, documentation, performance, and more.
